shipping_info.standard_shipping: Free for orders above INR 499, otherwise INR 49
shipping_info.express_shipping: INR 149 flat, delivery in 1-2 days (select cities)
shipping_info.cod_fee: INR 25 for orders below INR 1000, free above that

loyalty_program.name: ShopSphere+ Rewards
loyalty_program.description: Earn 1 point per INR 50 spent. Redeem 100 points for INR 50 discount. Free membership.

faqs.question: How do I track my order?
faqs.answer: Go to 'My Orders' section or ask this chatbot with your order ID to get real-time tracking status.

faqs.question: Do you offer international shipping?
faqs.answer: Currently ShopSphere only ships within India. International shipping is planned for the future.

faqs.question: How can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
faqs.answer: Address changes are possible only before the order is shipped. Contact support immediately with your order ID.

faqs.question: Is Cash on Delivery available everywhere?
faqs.answer: COD is available in most serviceable pin codes, with a small fee for orders below INR 1000.

faqs.question: How do I contact a human agent?
faqs.answer: Call 1800-123-4567 or use the live chat option available 8 AM - 11 PM IST. WhatsApp support is also available.
